public_reputation: Temple cleric who hears grief petitions before body-transfer contracts are sealed.
appearance: Ritual-dark vestments, funerary tokens, and carefully maintained sacred materials make consequence visible at a glance.
manner: Balances comfort with correction, sounding gentle until rite, taboo, or consequence is threatened. In Panim, that reads as someone grave, measured, and ritual-aware, with constant awareness of consequence, grief, and divine mediation, and the habits of a clerics still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of clerics in and around Panim Haven, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Panim Haven workable through the obligations of clerics while managing the immediate pressure of divine balance obligations in Panim.
hidden_pressure: Must keep sacred procedure credible while grief, fear, or opportunism press for shortcuts. Around Panim Haven, that usually means carrying divine balance obligations, sacrificial and mediation decorum, institutional scrutiny without letting the role of clerics visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Any alliance with Registrar-Confessor Othan Mire can expose the party to taboo, doctrine, or institutional expectation centered on Panim Haven.
Registrar-Confessor Othan Mire needs discreet aid to prevent a ritual lapse, desecration, or public crisis of trust around Panim Haven.
Registrar-Confessor Othan Mire may ask the party to retrieve someone, something, or some truth before a rite can proceed safely.
Registrar-Confessor Othan Mire needs help with a problem in Panim Haven that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Integrated from the prior_release canon-ready named-NPC ledger append. Unsupported fields remain restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Ritual dress, offering marks, and devotional cadence make Registrar-Confessor Othan Mire immediately legible as a spiritual intermediary. In Panim Haven, this lands inside a public field already shaped by House Panim.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Panim Haven: shrines, cathedrals, funerary halls, or ritual precincts
